author: Maarten Albarda
title: Forget AI -- It's The Rest Of Your Marketing Plan That Needs Attention
description: Are you trading your brand's soul for a better spot in a search result on a grocer's app? Is that growing your brand, or just funding the retailer's bottom line?
content:
I set myself a challenge this week: to NOT mention, write about AI or even contemplate anything to do with the impact of AI on marketing.
Let’s face it, you are probably sick and
tired of hearing a… [+3154 chars]
